title: hieracium saxifragum subsp. orimeles
intro: Hieracium saxifragum subsp. orimeles, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountains of Europe. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium saxifragum subsp. orimeles include reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
